CustomField.formula: IF(ISBLANK( Codebtor_Phone_Home__c ), "", IF(LEN(Codebtor_Phone_Home__c ) = 10, "(" + LEFT( Codebtor_Phone_Home__c, 3) + ") " + MID(Codebtor_Phone_Home__c, 4, 3) + "-" + MID(Codebtor_Phone_Home__c , 7, 4), Codebtor_Phone_Home__c ) )
CustomField.label: Secondary Debtor Home Phone Format
